items.title: Stage a proposal — captures live before-state, persists pending, tenant-scoped
items.precondition: Super-admin session; a website project with a page carrying seo_data.
steps: 1. POST /api/admin/websites/:id/seo/metadata-proposals with { pageId, proposedTitle, proposedDescription, rationale }.
items.expected: 201 with a pending row whose before_title/before_description come from the page's live seo_data; a pageId outside the project returns 404 PAGE_NOT_FOUND.
items.evidence: Layer 1: src/__tests__/page-metadata-proposals.test.ts — stageProposal suite (live before-state, null before-state, EMPTY_PROPOSAL, tenant-scoped PAGE_NOT_FOUND) all pass.
items.notes: Layer-1 verified. Layer-2 (live HTTP) pending — needs the running app.

items.title: Approve stages the rewrite; reject closes it; review is idempotent
items.precondition: A pending proposal id from T1.
items.expected: First call returns the row at status=approved with reviewed_by set; second call returns 409 PROPOSAL_ALREADY_REVIEWED; an unknown id returns 404 PROPOSAL_NOT_FOUND. No live page changes (publishing is a separate step).
items.evidence: Layer 1: page-metadata-proposals.test.ts — approve/reject suite (approve records reviewer, reject, PROPOSAL_NOT_FOUND, 409 PROPOSAL_ALREADY_REVIEWED) all pass.
items.notes: Layer-1 verified. Layer-2 (live HTTP) pending — needs the running app.

items.title: Boundary validation rejects malformed input
steps: 1. POST .../metadata-proposals with a non-uuid pageId or an empty proposedTitle.
items.expected: 400 VALIDATION_ERROR on the bad body and the bad status query (schemas are .strict(), enforce mode).
items.notes: Schema unit is covered by tsc + the zod schema; live 400 behavior pending a running app.
